stage_heroText: Combining Frontend Development, with Cinematic Drone footage, and user-centric UI Designs to tell your unique story with depth, clarity, and beauty
stage_aboutText:
👋 Hi I'm Enrique, a Frontend Engineer focused on building scalable, high-quality digital experiences. 
 I specialize in React, TypeScript, and design systems, helping teams turn product ideas and design concepts into reliable, elegant interfaces.
stage_aboutText2:
With a strong eye for design and system thinking, I build responsive, high-performance interfaces that are intuitive, accessible, and visually refined. 
 I enjoy improving existing products, structuring scalable frontend architectures, and collaborating with designers and product teams to deliver experiences that feel both thoughtful and technically robust.
stage_aboutListItem1: 🛠️ Clean, scalable code that supports long-term maintainability
stage_aboutListItem3: 🚀 Performance-focused development for fast user experiences
stage_aboutListItem3_ai: 🤖 Leveraging modern AI tools to accelerate development and problem solving
stage_aboutListItem4: 🔍 Industry best practices and thoughtful engineering decisions
stage_aboutListItem5: 🎥 Creative storytelling through modern digital interfaces
stage_keyOfferings_userInterfaceDescript: Thoughtfully crafted UI experiences built around clarity, usability, and strong visual structure.
stage_keyOfferings_webDevelopmentDescrip: Modern, high-performance websites and applications built with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
stage_keyOfferings_droneDescription: Turning design systems and prototypes into pixel-precise, reliable frontend interfaces.
stage_whyMe_provenExperienceDescription: Experience across multiple industries, building digital platforms with care, clarity, and long-term thinking.
stage_whyMe_remoteExpertiseDescription: Comfortable working with distributed teams across Europe and international organizations.
stage_whyMe_flexibleAdaptiveDescription: From short collaborations to longer product engagements, I adapt to the needs and rhythm of the team.
stage_modernTools_content_text: I integrate modern AI-assisted development tools to improve productivity, accelerate prototyping, and explore better solutions during the development process.
stage_modernTools_content_text2: These tools help teams move faster while maintaining high code quality and thoughtful architecture.
stage_ctaHeadline: Ready to elevate your digital presence or see how my unique skills can benefit you?
stage_ctaHeadlineDescription: If you’re working on a product, platform, or digital experience and need strong frontend development, feel free to reach out.
article_paragraphs_p1:
My path has never been a straight one. It’s moved through art, design, architecture, and technology, but as languages I’ve learned to speak with my hands and heart.
 This background is how I approach my frontend engineering today, with attention to detail, structure, and visual clarity.
article_paragraphs_p2: I love building digital experiences that are clear. I care about design that feels intuitive. I find joy in the process of creating, and in helping others express their ideas that matter.
article_paragraphs_p3: These days, I work with people who want to build things that feel real.
article_paragraphs_p4: When I’m not creating, I’m probably flying my drone, taking black & white photographs.
company1_name: Sembo - Stena Line Travel Group AB
company1_details:
Rebuilt main website.
Collaborated closely with other Engineers, UI/UX team to establish and shape a design system.
Updated new fresh corporate colors, typography, spacing and other variables across legacy sites and laying the base foundation of the new theme to the main site and project.
Worked closely with Marketing and UI/UX team to enhance the traveler's experience, while contributing daily with team mates building components and updating them to add to the project.
company2_details:
Developed and implemented Design System for both the company's Web apps and corporate website.
Facilitated collaborative team sessions, introducing the Design System to external teams, and provide coaching to employees to effectively work on the CMS and internal applications.
Conducted research, reviewed customer feedback, and conducted employee interview to drive improvement to the internal web applications to efficiently and effectively employing faster processing and workflows to increase productivity.
company3_details:
Served as a mentor and coach for new team members, new trainee employees, and developed educational material and career plans for Frontend Development. Facilitated team sessions using design thinking techniques.
Worked with different Agile teams, cross-functional teams. Focused in multi-page web app projects for various clients, Responsive cross-browser compatibility website projects with some projects focused on accessibility, documented components, and Design Systems for various clients. Built Landing pages, Proof of Concept projects, and projects under NDA for various clients.
Contributed to Open Source Projects and in-house projects: Coding guidelines and VEAMS Framework
company4_details:
Specializing in video technology and media distribution, working closely with small teams, learning new technologies, tools, and best practices.
Contributing to/and Improving UI/UX on various video projects in the frontend: Cloud Software Component to generate Virtual linear channels, B2B Admin Management Portals, and a Video Stream Corruptor to simulate traffic issues.
Designing and building Landing pages for various video web applications with the latest tools and frameworks.
company5_details: Designed and developed iteratively on Websites and Mobile Hybrid applications, Worked closely with IT team and Back-End Developers to improve and build better user interfaces and user experiences. Created and built user flows, wireframes, designed high-quality mockups, and built live Prototypes, and websites using CSS frameworks: Bootstrap, Foundation, and jQuery tools: jQuery UI, jQuery Mobile...
company6_details:
Responsible to create a Responsive Web Design for their corporate website and build the Website according to the Designs as well as a Wordpress website for one of their Services.
Created new logos for their services. Worked together with team members within each department to improve SEO performance.
Coached employers in how to work with Wordpress.
project1_shortDesc: Marketplace platform redesign and implementation for a flexible travel booking experience.
project1_overview:
Sembo is a travel marketplace offering flexible booking for car holidays, flights, hotels, and vacation homes. 
As part of a larger platform redesign, I helped rebuild the main marketplace experience using Next.js and Sanity CMS, focusing on performance, scalability, and a strong design system foundation. 
The goal was to create a modern frontend architecture that would support marketing needs while improving the overall customer journey.
project1_role:
Senior FE Developer 
Working closely with product, marketing, design, and engineering teams to deliver a scalable frontend platform.
project1_team: Product manager, Frontend & Backend developers, , UI/UX Designers, Marketing Team, Devops
project1_tools: Next.js, React, Sanity CMS, Storybook, Cypress, Figma
project1_contributionsText1: Building a modern marketplace using Next.js and a modular component structure.
project1_contributionsText2: Introducing reusable UI components and documentation to improve consistency and collaboration between design and development.
project1_contributionsText3: Improving loading speed and responsiveness across devices, particularly on mobile.
project1_contributionsText4: Helping translate design concepts into production-ready components while supporting marketing content workflows through the CMS.
project1_keyResultsText4: Introduced a scalable design system and component architecture
project1_keyResultsText5: Enabled faster content updates through Sanity CMS integration
project2_extendedTitle: SIGNUM Compliance Platform – Design System & Application Modernization
project2_shortDesc: Design system and UI foundation for compliance and risk-management platforms used across multiple internal applications.
project2_overview:
SIGNUM Consulting develops compliance and risk-management platforms used by organizations that require reliable internal tools and consistent digital interfaces. 
To support the growth of multiple internal applications and client-facing systems, we established a scalable design system and UI foundation that unified the visual language and frontend architecture across the company’s digital products.
The goal was to create consistency, improve collaboration between teams, and accelerate development across a growing ecosystem of applications.
project2_role:
UI/UX Designer & Frontend Developer 
I worked across design and engineering to help define the design system, implement reusable components, and support teams adopting the new structure across their applications.
project2_team: Managing Director, Frontend & Backend Developers, Marketing Team, DevOps, External Development Teams
project2_tools: Django, WordPress, Next.js, React, SASS, Bootstrap, TailwindCSS, Figma
project2_contributionsText1: Designing and implementing a scalable UI system that could be used consistently across multiple applications.
project2_contributionsText2: Developing reusable UI components and patterns to simplify frontend development and maintain visual consistency.
project2_contributionsText3: Facilitating collaboration between internal teams and external developers to ensure the design system could be adopted across different projects.
project2_contributionsText4: Creating documentation and guiding teams in using the design system and CMS tools effectively.
project2_keyResultsText1: Established a design system used across 28 applications
project2_keyResultsText4: Created a consistent UI across internal tools and public-facing systems
project2_keyResultsText5: Supported external teams in adopting scalable frontend practices
project2_figcaption2: Signum-Consult - Responsive Web and Mobile Site
project3_extendedTitle: Eyevinn Streaming Platform – Frontend tools for video streaming systems
project3_shortDesc: Frontend tools and interfaces supporting video streaming platforms and monitoring systems.
project3_overview:
Eyevinn Technology develops tools and platforms that support video streaming infrastructure and media services. 
As part of the frontend team, I worked on building interfaces and tools used by media engineers and development teams working with streaming platforms.
The work included dashboards, internal tools, and a public-facing team site showcasing the company’s expertise in streaming technology.
project3_role:
UI Designer & Frontend Developer 
I designed and developed frontend interfaces that supported both internal tooling and public-facing content.
project3_team: Media Consultant, Solution Architect, Media Solution Consultant Frontend & Backend Developers
project3_tools: React, Next.js, Material-UI, Webpack, Figma, GitHub
project3_contributionsText1: Developing frontend tools used to monitor and support streaming systems.
project3_contributionsText2: Creating reusable UI components for displaying real-time analytics and monitoring data.
project3_contributionsText3: Helping develop tools that simulate network conditions to test streaming reliability.
project3_contributionsText4: Building a responsive public-facing site presenting the team’s streaming expertise.
project3_keyResultsText1: Developed frontend tools used by media engineering teams
project3_keyResultsText2: Built reusable UI components for monitoring streaming systems
project3_keyResultsText3: Supported testing workflows through simulation tools
project3_keyResultsText4: Delivered responsive web interfaces showcasing streaming solutions
project3_figcaption: Eyevinn - Video Dev Team - Figma Design Screens Mobile/Desktop
project3_figcaption4: Eyevinn - Responsive Web and Mobile Site
project4_shortDesc: A leading digital agency at the intersection of strategy, creativity and technology.
project4_overview: Created Web Apps and Webpages with documented components and design system for various clients.

project4_solutions: Worked closely together with UI/UX designers and BE Developers to translate designs into code, ensuring that the usability worked well in different browsers while keeping in mind the maintainability, scalability and reliability of the products or projects. Developed and documented components and into a design system for each project and product. Components being fully responsive, ensuring accessibility standards optimized for mobile, and optimized for performance, later to be tested across devices and browsers to deliver the best user experience to users.

project5_tools: React, Next.js, CSS3, Webpack, Node.js, Docker, Figma, Material-UI, GitHub

Built reusable components to build the responsive landing page. Login and registration. And collaborated with BE to implement login and registration.

project7_shortDesc: Is an organisation for 81 Chambers of Industry and Commerce in Germany.
project7_overview: Implemented the UI designs into a website for the German Chamber of Commerce, this was a content management system to allow admin users to create, read, update and delete content.

project9_overview: Redesigned and Rebuilt Company's Webpage while ensuring scalability of the site and implemented analytics to improve SEO.

services_description: Between creativity and technology, I provide tailored solutions to elevate your digital presence. Whether you need a refresh of an existing project, a modern website optimized for desktop and mobile, or a custom design system to streamline your development process, I bring creative and technical expertise to meet your unique needs. With over a decade of experience across industries like travel, real estate, bakery, auto mechanics, sports, and digital media, I am here to help bring your vision to life.
services_travelAndTourismDescription: Building marketplaces and travel websites to simplify bookings.
services_riskManagementDescription: Web application to meet compliance requirements and streamline processes for regulated industries.
services_preEmploymentScreeningDescripti: Digital solutions for efficient and secure hiring processes websites.
services_immigrationServicesDescription: Developing web applications to support immigration systems.
services_chambersOfCommerceDescription: Websites for economic organizations for better connectivity and productivity.
services_sportsAndClubsDescription: Creating web & mobile sites to support sports organizations and member engagement.
services_streamingServicesDescription: Showcase video streaming solutions for teams building on-demand.
services_realEstateDescription: Websites to showcase properties and enhance the user search experience.
service_buildingMaterialsDescription: Providing web applications for cement providers.
service_healthSafetyDescription: Web tools and systems to improve safety standards and ensure compliance.
service_autoMechanicsDescription: Websites for auto repair shops and services like TÜV testing.
service_bakeriesPastriesDescription: Showcasing artisanal creations with visually appealing websites.
service_facadesArchitectureDescription: Web projects for elegant facade designs and architectural innovations.
service_creativeMediaDescription: Services for engaging media experiences and digital creativity.
keyOfferingHeadline: Custom solutions tailored to your needs
keyOfferingItem1Description: Building scalable component libraries and UI foundations that help teams move faster and maintain consistency across products.
keyOfferingItem2Description: Structuring modern React and TypeScript applications so they remain maintainable as products grow.
keyOfferingItem3Description: Developing clear, intuitive interfaces that support real workflows and real users.
keyOfferingItem4Description: Improving loading performance, responsiveness, and usability across complex digital platforms.
keyOfferingItem5Description: Leveraging AI-assisted tools and modern development practices to accelerate iteration while maintaining strong code quality.
service_ctaDescription: If you’re working on a product, platform, or digital experience and need strong frontend development, feel free to reach out.
